arts.ttl: Live updates: Reading look to keep play-off hopes alive at Mansfield Town
arts.sum: Reading travel to Mansfield Town on Easter Monday looking to keep their play-off hopes alive. Following Good Friday's defeat to Northampton Town, Leyton Orient leapfrogged the Royals into sixth spot. With three matches remaining, a win would be handy for Hunt's men.

arts.ttl: Reading team news: Two changes for crunch clash at Mansfield Town for Easter showdown
arts.sum: Reading boss Noel Hunt has made two changes for this afternoon's trip to Mansfield Town, a key match if the side are to reach the play-offs. Losing at home to Lincoln City on Good Friday, the Royals were replaced in sixth by Leyton Orient with just three matches remaining. Without a goal in their last two matches, the visitors are backed by over 1,700 at Stag Meadow today as the play-off hopes dwindle. Joel Pereira remains in goal looking for another away clean sheet, while Tivonge Rushesha replacing Kelvin Abrefa is the only change for a back line also containing Tyler Bindon, Amadou Mbengue and Andre Garcia.

arts.ttl: Reading coach on 'delight' at return for third spell and play-off hunt
arts.sum: Reading coach Nigel Gibbs is delighted to be back at the club, now working alongside two of his former players from his successful first stint. The Watford playing legend was originally brought to the club by Steve Coppell back in 2006, but it was not until Brian McDermott took over in 2009 that the former defender took up a prominent assistant manager role with the first-team. McDermott's second in command for the successful period in which the Royals reached two FA Cup quarter-finals and won the 2012 Championship, Gibbs departed in 2013 and joined McDermott at Leeds United. Key members of this squad were Noel Hunt and Mikele Leigertwood, Hunt being the man to bring Gibbs back after taking over as manager from Ruben Selles in December.

Mansfield ended their losing run against Rotherham on Friday after fighting back from 3-1 down to claim a draw that moves them one step closer to safety. The Stags are not in the clear just yet, with...

arts.ttl: Preview: Mansfield Town vs. Reading - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Mansfield Town and Reading, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
